fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B3 contains the label "Client Name", and that the value read from C3 is a valid string.
Verify that cell D2 contains the label "Opportunity ID (OPP-000XXXXXX)", and that the value read from E2 is a valid string.
Verify that cell D3 contains the label "Primary Market", and that the value read from E3 is a valid string.
Verify that cell F2 contains the label "Deal Owner (AE)", and that the value read from G2 is a valid string.
Verify that cell F3 contains the label "Cluster", and that the value read from G3 is a valid string.
Verify that cell H2 contains the label "Scenario Name", and that the value read from I2 is a valid string.
Verify that cell H3 contains the label "CI Ref (Finance to complete)", and that the value read from I3 is a valid string.

fields.field_name: Executive Summary: (Background - Overview of Client & Business Opportunity - What has triggered this request?)
fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B4 contains the label "Executive Summary: (Background - Overview of Client & Business Opportunity - What has triggered this request?)", and that the value read from B5 is a valid string.

fields.field_name: Alignment with VE Corporate goals: (How does this deal support VE’s corporate goals? )
fields.description: Alignment with VE Corporate goals: (How does this deal support VE’s corporate goals?

fields.field_name: Win / Retain Strategy (What is the sales strategy? - Idea of what the amount and structure of incentives & Client request?)
fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B8 contains the label "Win / Retain Strategy (What is the sales strategy? - Idea of what the amount and structure of incentives & Client request?)", and that the value read from B9 is a valid string.

fields.field_name: Key Benefits (What are the key reasons for approval?)
fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B10 contains the label "Key Benefits (What are the key reasons for approval?)", and that the value read from B11 is a valid string.

fields.field_name: Key Commercial Concerns (What are the key concerns about this opportunity?)
fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B12 contains the label "Key Commercial Concerns (What are the key concerns about this opportunity?)", and that the value read from B13 is a valid string.

fields.field_name: What other factors should be considered? (Concerns about the client?)
fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B14 contains the label "What other factors should be considered? (Concerns about the client?)", and that the value read from B15 is a valid string.
Verify that cell B18 contains the label "Deal Term", and that the value read from D18 is a valid number.

fields.field_name: Any existing VD portfolio under contract?
fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B19 contains the label "Any existing VD portfolio under contract?", and that the value read from D19 is a valid string.

fields.field_name: If existing, when does the contract end?
fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B20 contains the label "If existing, when does the contract end?", and that the value read from D20 is a valid date.

fields.field_name: Start Date for the new deal (qtr beginning)
fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B21 contains the label "Start Date for the new deal (qtr beginning)", and that the value read from D21 is a valid date.

fields.ai_prompt: Verify that cell B22 contains the label "End Date for the new deal (qtr ending)", and that the value read from D22 is a valid date.
